_comment: CI quality-gate thresholds, measured on the REAL public-document eval corpus (data/eval/raw, 18 docs across 5 categories; data/eval/golden_qa.jsonl, 45 questions). Floors (min) and the refusal ceiling (max) sit with margin around the measured deterministic baseline (TF-IDF, no faiss, no rerank, extractive writer): hit_rate@k 1.0, mrr 1.0, faithfulness 0.595, grounded_rate 0.956, expected_coverage 0.795, answer_relevance 1.0, citation_coverage 0.767, refusal_rate 0.0. Retrieval is saturated because the corpus is lexically distinct across domains; the discriminating gate is generation faithfulness. Regenerate metrics with: python -m adip.mlops.run_rag_eval --chunks data/processed/chunks.jsonl --index data/processed/vector_index --golden data/eval/golden_qa.jsonl --backend tfidf --no-faiss && python -m adip.mlops.run_generation_eval --index data/processed/vector_index --golden data/eval/golden_qa.jsonl
